reason: Confirms typecheck + lint + test are the truth signals.

Rule G (composite indexes) — the new two-where + orderBy query needs an index entry in firestore.indexes.json; also Rule F producer/consumer field-name consistency between the tool query and how tasks docs are written.
Jest + ts-jest patterns; the new test extends __tests__/assignTask.test.ts and must mirror its existing boundary-mocking shape (OpenAI stub, fake Firestore, no live calls).
Best-effort / degrade-to-empty contract for the new tool, mirroring searchMemberCommits.
